selection_criteria: Missing 2+ of: ACES tone mapping, chromatic aberration, dataTextureC feedback

shaders.notes: Atmospheric heat distortion — add ACES + chromatic on distortion edges + temporal heat shimmer
RGB channel weaving — chromatic aberration is a natural fit here
Neon dissolve with pulse — add audio-reactive pulse + temporal persistence
CRT scanlines — add ACES + chromatic on scanline gaps + temporal phosphor persistence
Watercolor effect — add ACES + chromatic on wet edges + temporal pigment bleed
Oil slick colors — chromatic aberration will enhance iridescence beautifully
Pixel swirl tornado — add ACES + chromatic on spiral arms + temporal trail
Edge linking filter — add ACES + chromatic on linked edges + temporal edge accumulation
Frost crystal reveal — add ACES + chromatic on crystal facets + temporal frost growth
Slime drip distortion — add ACES + chromatic on drip meniscus + temporal viscosity
